description: Text graphic on a near-white (cream) background, landscape orientation. There is no photo, illustration, or person. A bold black serif headline reads 'Our Mission' at top left, with the words highlighted in a soft yellow or gold marker-style block behind the text. Below, a multi-line serif body paragraph (also set on yellow highlight blocks running the width of each line) reads: 'To foster, promote, and develop the welfare of the wage earners, job seekers, and retirees of the United States; improve working conditions; advance opportunities for profitable employment; and assure work-related benefits and rights.' The bottom-right corner carries the wordmark 'dol.gov' in bold black.
notable_text: Our Mission / To foster, promote, and develop the welfare of the wage earners, job seekers, and retirees of the United States; improve working conditions; advance opportunities for profitable employment; and assure work-related benefits and rights. / dol.gov
